## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format .` are clean
- [ ] `uv run ty check` passes
- [ ] New behaviour has a test
- [ ] Business logic stays out of `interface/`; the SDK stays in `infrastructure/`
